daily.today_energy: Your mind is electric today, Gemini. Channel that restless energy into something creative—your ideas are hitting different right now. Trust the momentum, but don't scatter yourself too thin.
daily.love: Someone's picking up on your vibe. Whether you're single or coupled up, authenticity is your superpower today. Skip the games and let people see the real you. Connection happens when you're genuinely present.
daily.career: Your communication skills are off the charts today. This is the moment to pitch that idea, have that conversation, or collaborate with someone you've been meaning to connect with. Your words carry weight.
daily.health: Your nervous system might feel a bit buzzy—that's just your energy running high. Ground yourself with something tactile: a walk, water, or just breathing intentionally. Your body's asking for presence, not productivity.

weekly.overview: Mercury's moving through your sector of self-expression this week, Gemini. You're giving main character energy—trust your instincts when they whisper something spicy. A plot twist mid-week might actually be the plot twist you needed.
weekly.love: Your vibe is magnetic rn. Whether you're single or taken, there's a conversation brewing that feels overdue. Don't overthink it; your natural charm is already doing the heavy lifting. Someone notices.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. This is prime time to pitch, propose, or pivot—the universe has your back on creative moves. Even tedious tasks feel less draining when you lean into your unique approach.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more rest than usual; listen without judgment. Moving your body in ways that feel good (not obligatory) matters way more than intensity. Mental clarity comes when you honor what you actually need.
